title: FT Vest Bitcoin Strategy Floor15 ETF - July declares $0.1473 dividend
content:
* FT Vest Bitcoin Strategy Floor15 ETF - July (BFJL [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/BFJL]) declares $0.1473/share annual dividend [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20349304-first-trust-advisors-l-p-announces-distributions-for-exchange-traded-funds] 
 	* Payable Dec. 31; for shareholders of record Dec. 29; ex-div Dec. 29.
 	* See BFJL Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth. [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/BFJL/dividends?source=news_bullet]

MORE ON FT VEST BITCOIN STRATEGY FLOOR15 ETF JULY
